// Sokoban for P-LAB TMS9918 Graphic Card
// Classic push-boxes puzzle - 4354 bytes
// 47 levels: 3 teaching + Microban I #1..#44
// by David W. Skinner (2000)
// Port by VERHILLE Arnaud, 2026
//
// 32x24 Graphics I, 7 tile types with per-tile colour
// (grey wall, red target, yellow box, green box-on-target,
//  blue player, green player-on-target, black floor).
//
// Before loading, enable the P-LAB TMS9918 card in Hardware menu.
// Keyboard: W/A/S/D (QWERTY) or Z/Q/S/D (AZERTY)
// Other keys: R=reset level, N=next level
// Type 280R in Woz Monitor to run
